---
title: "TD3"
format: html
editor: visual
---
```{r}
df_velo<- read.csv("244400404_comptages-velo-nantes-metropole.csv")
```

question 1
```{r}
df_b_788 <- df_velo[df_velo$boucle == 788, ]
df_b_805 <- df_velo[df_velo$boucle == 805, ]

# jours
df_d_0105 <- df_velo[df_velo$date == "2022-05-01", ]
df_d_1506 <- df_velo[df_velo$date == "2022-06-15", ]
```
